raw_text: {"round_id":"CB-2026-06-12-1W","model_id":"anthropic-claude-opus-4-8","provider":"anthropic","mode":"closed_capability","portfolio":[{"option_id":"CONSUMER_STAPLES","allocation_pct":30,"rationale":"Defensive sector with strong recent relative strength (+3.94% 7d) into a hot CPI/PPI print and FOMC week; low beta cushion against tech selloff."},{"option_id":"HEALTHCARE","allocation_pct":25,"rationale":"Defensive leadership (+1.32% 7d, +5.65% 30d) with attractive valuation; benefits from rotation away from rate-sensitive growth amid sticky inflation."},{"option_id":"LOW_VOL","allocation_pct":20,"rationale":"Low-volatility factor outperformed (+1.96% 7d) during recent drawdown; defensive tilt suited to FOMC and elevated VIX week."},{"option_id":"LARGE_VALUE","allocation_pct":15,"rationale":"Value held up far better than growth (-0.52% vs -4.15% 7d) amid rising yields and hot inflation data favoring cyclical/value tilt."},{"option_id":"SHORT_TREASURY","allocation_pct":10,"rationale":"Cash-like anchor yielding positive carry with zero drawdown risk through FOMC and multiple data releases."}],"confidence":0.55,"portfolio_rationale":"Hot CPI/PPI, rising long yields (10Y 4.55%, 30Y 5.03%), and a hawkish-risk FOMC on 6/17 argue for defensive, low-beta positioning while tech/growth shows clear weakness; tilt to staples, healthcare, low-vol and value to beat a cap-weighted SPX skewed to vulnerable mega-cap growth."},"rationale_summary":"Defensive rotation into staples, healthcare, low-vol and value plus T-bills to outperform a tech-heavy S&P 500 during a hot-inflation, FOMC-decision week.","key_risks":["A dovish FOMC surprise or soft retail sales could spark a tech/growth rally, causing defensives to lag SPY.","Defensive sectors are rate-sensitive; further rises in long yields could pressure staples and low-vol holdings.","Value/cyclical leadership could reverse sharply if risk-on sentiment returns mid-week."]}
